history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot of a young Asian woman with dark, messy hair pulled up, wearing a black blazer over a black tank top. She has bold, dramatic makeup with dark eyeliner and bright red lipstick, and is holding a red lollipop with a white stick up to her lips. She's wearing large hoop earrings and two layered silver chain necklaces, one with a circular pendant. The blazer is adorned with several silver safety pin brooches, one in the shape of a stylized "Z". The background is a rough, textured concrete wall on the left and a dark, corrugated metal shutter on the right. The lighting is dramatic and moody, with strong shadows and highlights, emphasizing the textures and the woman's features. The overall color palette is dark and monochromatic, with the red of the lipstick and lollipop providing a striking contrast. The mood is edgy, confident, and slightly mysterious. Text overlay in the upper left corner reads "prompt by yerüm Bao 🌸".
